titleStmt.title: SII 42.117: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 117. (A.R. No. B. 133 of 1954-55.) Ēlēśvaram, Devarakonda Taluk, Nalgonda District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a granite pillar set up in front of the Śiva temple on the bank of the Kṛishṇā.
Records the service (dāsatvam) of Uttamagaṇḍa Bhīmanātha, son of Kaṁḍidēvi and a servant of Gaṇḍagōpāla, to god Ēlēśvara for the merit of Gaṇapatidēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śāradāṁ hṛdayānaṁda saṁdō
hāmṛtadāyinī vaṁdē kuṁ
tasrabhā miṁdu kalā kalā kalita
saṁtrahāṁ . kākatīśakṣitīśānā
mastēvaṁśapayōnidhiḥ yatrāśrī(sī)
tprōlabhūpāla kalānidhi śivāṁśa
paraḥ . dhairyyē śailapatiḥ samagra
samaraḥ prakhyāta sītāpatiḥ sa
dvāṇīpati raṁganārati patissaṁ
gīta vidyāpatiggāṁbhīryyāppa
ṭhipaduṣu kākatapatissatkīrtti
kāṁttāpati ttārēbhāti kaḷāpati
rggaṇapati kṣōṇīpati śrīpatiḥ .
triṇayanāṁghri sarōja ma(dhu)
vratōraṇa jayāsvadharāmayē
śōdharōguṇanidhirvvara kāketa
vallabhō gaṇapati kṣitipō bhuvi rā
jatē . puṇyakṣētrālavālē jagati
nuta lasatkṛṣṇavēṇyā jalāghai
samyakpūrṇna samasta su
ravara vinutā dharmmakāryamu
laḥ . gaṇapanṛpa dattaṁ śrī girī
śānamētaṁ guṇanidhi pō
ṁśurapālayiṣyatyavaśyaḥ saka
la sukhasubhāgyastanya
dhā karttu piccaṁrnniradhī niriya
ṇā janaṁ pōpabhāksaḥ . kaṁḍidē
vi koḍku gaṁḍḍagōpāluni baṁṭṭu [U*]
ttamagaṁḍabhīmanādhaṁḍu ga
ṇapatidēvamahārājunakuṁ bu
ṇyamugā śrī yēlēśvaradēvara
kuṁjēsina dāsatvamu maṁ
ggaḷaṁ mahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 42.117 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
